chunks.text: Besties welcome former NJ Governor and Republican Presidential Candidate Chris Christie!
Ukraine / Russia: culpability, where to go from here
US defense budget, optimizing spend, zero-based budgeting, influence peddling
Immigration policy, how each party co-opts the issue
Fentanyl crisis in SF, LA, and NYC, incarceration and criminal justice reform, political activism in law enforcement
Why Chris Christie is running for president
Thoughts on prosecuting Trump, January 6th, and more
Chris Christie addresses his past controversies

Post-interview debrief Follow the besties: https://twitter.com/chamath https://linktr.ee/calacanis https://twitter.com/DavidSacks https://twitter.com/friedberg Follow Chris Christie: https://twitter.com/GovChristie Follow the pod: https://twitter.com/theallinpod https://linktr.ee/allinpodcast Intro Music Credit: https://rb.gy/tppkzl https://twitter.com/yung_spielburg Intro Video Credit: https://twitter.com/TheZachEffect Referenced in the show: https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/GFDEBTN https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/SMPOPNETMUSA https://www.cbp.gov/newsroom/stats/southwest-land-border-encounters https://www.washingtonpost.com/immigration/2023/08/31/border-families-record-crossings-biden
